description:
External pen test before LegitScript submission and production launch. Findings drive issue tickets in `ISS-*` for remediation.

**Scope**
- Vendor selection (Cure53, Latacora, Trail of Bits, Bishop Fox, or comparable). Healthcare-domain experience preferred.
- Scope of test:
  - Authentication + session management (better-auth surface).
  - Authorization (middleware journey gates, admin tooling).
  - Webhook receivers (signature bypass attempts on Stripe / MDI / Persona).
  - PHI handling (KMS envelope, audit log, mirror integrity).
  - AWS infrastructure (network segmentation, IAM, secrets).
- Scheduled after the bulk of hardening is in (audit verifier, reconcilers, admin tooling) but before T-077.
- Each finding becomes a storybloq issue with severity matching the report; critical/high block launch.
- Re-test scope agreed with vendor after remediation.

**Acceptance**
- Final report with executive summary attached to `docs/legitscript/pen-test-<date>.md`.
- All critical and high findings closed (issue → resolved); medium/low captured for ongoing work.
title: Penetration test engagement
